copy.introHookLine: Protect your family for life. Build savings you can use anytime.
copy.introHowToPlay: Move your shield to catch falling power-ups and destroy risks. Auto-fire protects you automatically!
copy.scoringTagline: Securing your family's tomorrow is within reach!
copy.scoringCtaLine: Connect with our relationship manager now!
copy.thankYouBody: Thank you for sharing your details. Our Relationship Manager will reach out to you shortly.
